languages.text: Массивный перстень вплавлен в камень. На нетронутой плазмой части различим герб Гапраков.

traits.locale_text: Массивный перстень вплавлен в камень. На нетронутой плазмой части различим герб Гапраков.

languages.text: A heavy ring is fused into the stone. On the part that was spared by the plasma, the coat of arms of House Gaprak is barely visible.
languages.original_text: Массивный перстень вплавлен в камень. На нетронутой плазмой части различим герб Гапраков.

traits.locale_text: A heavy ring is fused into the stone. On the part that was spared by the plasma, you can barely identify the coat of arms of House Gaprak.
A heavy ring is fused into the stone. On the part that was spared by the plasma, the coat of arms of House Gaprak is barely visible.
A heavy ring lies in the dirt. It bears the coat of arms of House Gaprak.

A heavy ring is fused into the stone. On the part that was spared by the plasma, the coat of arms of House Gaprak is barely visible.

languages.text: Ein schwerer Ring mit dem Stein verschmolzen. Auf dem vom Plasma verschonte Teil ist mit Mühe das Wappen von Haus Gaprak zu erkennen.
languages.original_text: A heavy ring is fused into the stone. On the part that was spared by the plasma, the coat of arms of House Gaprak is barely visible.

traits.locale_text: Ein schwerer Ring mit dem Stein verschmolzen. Auf dem vom Plasma verschonte Teil ist mit Mühe das Wappen von Haus Gaprak zu erkennen.

languages.text: 一个沉重的圆环熔铸在石头里。通过未被等离子灼烧的那部分，依稀能看出这是贾帕克家族的纹章。
languages.original_text: A heavy ring is fused into the stone. On the part that was spared by the plasma, the coat of arms of House Gaprak is barely visible.

traits.locale_text: 一个沉重的圆环熔铸在石头里。通过未被等离子灼烧的那部分，依稀能看出这是贾帕克家族的纹章。

languages.text: Une chevalière a fusionné avec la pierre. Sur la partie épargnée par le plasma, on distingue vaguement les armoiries de la maison Gaprak.
languages.original_text: A heavy ring is fused into the stone. On the part that was spared by the plasma, the coat of arms of House Gaprak is barely visible.

traits.locale_text: Une chevalière a fusionné avec la pierre. Sur la partie épargnée par le plasma, on distingue vaguement les armoiries de la maison Gaprak.

languages.text: Un anillo pesado está fundido con la piedra. En la parte que no ha alcanzado el plasma, se identifica a duras penas el escudo de armas de la casa Gaprak.
languages.original_text: A heavy ring is fused into the stone. On the part that was spared by the plasma, the coat of arms of House Gaprak is barely visible.

traits.locale_text: Un anillo pesado está fundido con la piedra. En la parte que no ha alcanzado el plasma, se identifica a duras penas el escudo de armas de la casa Gaprak.

languages.text: Ağır bir yüzük, taşa kaynaşmış. Plazmanın zarar vermediği kısmında Gaprak Hanesi'nin arması zar zor seçiliyor.
languages.original_text: A heavy ring is fused into the stone. On the part that was spared by the plasma, the coat of arms of House Gaprak is barely visible.

traits.locale_text: Ağır bir yüzük, taşa kaynaşmış. Plazmanın zarar vermediği kısmında Gaprak Hanesi'nin arması zar zor seçiliyor.

languages.text: 重厚なリングが石に熔け込んでいる。プラズマの攻撃を免れた部分には、ガプラク家の紋章がかすかに残っている。
languages.original_text: A heavy ring is fused into the stone. On the part that was spared by the plasma, the coat of arms of House Gaprak is barely visible.

traits.locale_text: 重厚なリングが石に熔け込んでいる。プラズマの攻撃を免れた部分には、ガプラク家の紋章がかすかに残っている。
